allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Fix wrangler.toml for Cloudflare Pages deployment:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Simplify wrangler.toml for Cloudflare Pages:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Remove wrangler.toml - let Cloudflare Pages handle deployment:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add package.json for Cloudflare Pages build configuration:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Restore wrangler.toml for proper Pages deployment:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add BLOG_KV namespace ID to wrangler.toml:*)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m 'Trigger Cloudflare Pages redeployment with KV namespace:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add _routes.json to enable Cloudflare Pages Functions routing:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Remove _routes.json - not needed for Pages Functions:*)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m 'Trigger redeploy with KV namespace binding:*)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m 'Trigger redeploy with ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variable:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add debug logging to auth check:*)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix auth check - explicit password validation:*)
